commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The branch redesigns publisher profile chrome and catalog presentation, adds grouped/search/sort catalog controls and profile reporting, updates list item helpers/tests/e2e assertions, and commits Playwright screenshot proof plus a capture script.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR-introduced blocker from source inspection: a skills catalog with activeStatus CanLoadMore, non-empty catalogSearch, selected group all, and non-null activePublishedDisplay returns false from the load-more helper. I did not run a browser reproduction because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can address the catalog search pagination blocker without deciding the broader UX direction.

target.title: feat(web): polish publisher profile detail and catalog UX
target.body:
## Summary

- Polish publisher profile hero, stats, members, links, and sticky catalog chrome.
- Group skills by topic/manifest sections with browse-style controls (tabs, sort, search, topic chips).
- Default to the Plugins tab when a publisher has plugins but no skills; keep Skills as the primary tab when both exist.
- Preserve scoped plugin detail links on publisher catalog rows and keep pagination available during catalog search.
- Square org avatars, mobile-only official badge beside handle, and consistent member placeholder sizing.

## Visual proof

### @openclaw

**Desktop · light**

![@openclaw publisher profile — Desktop · light](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vyctorbrzezowski/clawhub/brzezowski/publisher-detail-polish/proof/publisher-detail-polish/openclaw-desktop-light.png)

## Test plan

- [x] `bun run ci:static` (format + lint on touched files)
- [x] `VITE_CONVEX_URL=https://example.invalid bun run vitest run src/__tests__/user-profile-route.test.tsx src/components/PublishedItemCard.test.tsx src/components/PluginListItem.test.tsx`
- [ ] CI

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
